mesa 0.99.1

  • Changelog

Reference

All functions

BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg19.CpG.distribution BSgenome.Hsapiens.NCBI.GRCh38.CpG.distribution BSgenome.Mmusculus.UCSC.mm10.CpG.distribution

Pre-calculated CpG distribution values for BSgenomes

ENCODEbadRegions

2019 ENCODE list of poorly mapped regions in hg38

FantomRegions

FANTOM5 regions for GRCh38

addBamCoveragePairedAndUnpaired()

Add coverage to a qseaSet using proper pairs and/or high-quality R1 reads

addHMMcopyCNV()

Add per-sample CNV calls to a qseaSet using HMMcopy

addHyperStableFraction()

Summarise the fraction of hyper-stable methylated regions (GRCh38 only)

addLibraryInformation()

Add library metrics to the qseaSet sample table

addMedipsEnrichmentFactors()

Add MEDIPS-style enrichment metrics to a qseaSet sample table

addNormalisation()

Add qsea normalisation steps with defaults

addSummaryAcrossWindows()

Append window summaries to the sample table

filterByOverlaps() filterByNonOverlaps()

Subset a qseaSet by overlaps / non-overlaps with genomic regions

annotateWindows()

Annotate genomic windows using ChIPseeker (with optional CpG/FANTOM context)

arrange(<qseaSet>)

Arrange (reorder) samples in a qseaSet via dplyr syntax

asValidGranges()

Coerce common tabular inputs to GRanges

calculateCGEnrichment()

CpG enrichment from a BAM file (MEDIPS-style)

calculateCGEnrichmentGRanges()

CpG enrichment from GRanges of reads (MEDIPS-style)

calculateDMRs()

Fit GLM and return DMR data in one step

calculateFractionReadsInGRanges()

Fraction of thresholded windows overlapping a set of regions

calculateGenomicCGDistribution()

Genome-wide CpG statistics (relH and GoGe)

colnames(<qseaSet>)

Column names of a qseaSet sample table

combineQsets()

Combine two qseaSets

combineQsetsList()

Combine multiple qseaSets

convertToArrayBetaTable()

Convert qsea beta values to array-like probe matrix

countWindowsAboveCutoff()

Count windows above a cutoff

downSample()

Downsample reads in a qseaSet

exampleMouse

A small example qseaSet with 5 paired tumour/normal samples.

exampleTumourNormal

A small example qseaSet with 5 paired tumour/normal samples.

filter(<qseaSet>)

Filter samples in a qseaSet

filterWindows()

Filter regions (windows) inside a qseaSet

fitQseaGLM()

Fit a generalized linear model (GLM) to a qseaSet

gc_hg38_1000kb gc_hg38_500kb gc_hg38_50kb

GC content across the human genome (hg38/GRCh38)

getBetaTable()

Get beta per window

getCGPositions()

Genomic positions of a motif (CG) from MEDIPS

getCountTable()

Get counts per window

getDMRsData()

Extract DMR-level results from a fitted GLM

getDataTable()

Extract per-window data (counts / NRPM / beta)

getPCA() getUMAP() getDimRed()

Generate a PCA from a qseaSet

getGenomicFeatureDistribution()

Summarise signal by genomic context

getMesaAnnoDb()

Get annotation DB for current or specified genome

getMesaGenome()

Get current mesa genome setting

getMesaTxDb()

Get TxDb for current or specified genome

getNRPMTable()

Get NRPM per window

getPattern()

Infer pattern names from region density columns

getSampleQCSummary()

Summarise key QC fields per sample

getWindowNames()

Get window names from a qseaSet or ranges/table

getWindows()

Extract the regions (windows) used in a qseaSet

hg19ToHg38.over.chain

hg19tohg38 liftover chain

hg38CpGIslands

CpG islands for hg38.

hg38UltraStableProbes

Ultra-stable methylated regions (GRCh38)

hg38_450kArrayGR

Infinium 450k probe locations for hg38.

is.qseaSet()

Check whether an object is a qseaSet

left_join(<mesaDimRed>)

Left-join onto the sample table of a mesaDimRed

left_join(<qseaSet>)

Left join data onto a qseaSet sample table

liftOverHg19()

Lift over genomic ranges from hg19 to hg38

makeAllContrasts()

Generate all possible pairwise contrasts

makeQset()

Construct an initial qseaSet from BAMs and metadata

makeTransposedTable()

Make a wide sample-by-window table

map_hg38_1000kb map_hg38_500kb map_hg38_50kb

Mappability across the human genome (hg38/GRCh38)

mesaDimRed() show(<mesaDimRed>)

Dimensionality reduction results container

mesaPCA() show(<mesaPCA>)

PCA results container

mesaUMAP() show(<mesaUMAP>)

UMAP results container

mixSamples()

Mix two samples to generate a synthetic qseaSet sample

mutate(<mesaDimRed>)

Mutate the sample table of a mesaDimRed

mutate(<qseaSet>)

Mutate columns in a qseaSet sample table

pivotDMRsLonger()

Transform DMR results to long format

plotCNVheatmap()

CNV heatmap across samples

plotCorrelationMatrix()

Sample correlation heatmap

plotDMRUpset()

UpSet plot of DMR overlaps

plotDimRed()

Plot dimensionality reduction results

plotGeneHeatmap()

Plot sample signal over windows spanning a gene (± flanks) as a heatmap using ComplexHeatmap. The gene can be given as a HGNC symbol or Ensembl ID.

plotGenomicFeatureDistribution()

Distribution of windows across genomic features

plotPCA.mesaDimRed()

Plot principal component analysis (PCA) results

plotRegionsHeatmap()

Heatmap of signal across selected genomic regions

plotUMAP()

Plot UMAP results

poolSamples()

Pool (merge) samples that share a common name prefix

pull(<qseaSet>)

Pull a column from a qseaSet sample table

qseaTableToChrGRanges()

Convert a makeTable-like data frame to GRanges (UCSC style)

removeCNV()

Remove (zero out) CNV data from a qseaSet

removeLibraryFactors()

Set library factors to 1

removeNormMethodSuffix()

Remove normalisation suffix from column names

remove_almost_empty_cols()

Remove almost-empty columns from a data frame

renameQsetNames()

Rename samples in a qseaSet by regex

renameSamples()

Rename samples using a column from the sample table

runHMMCopy()

Run HMMcopy on per-window reads for a single sample

select(<qseaSet>)

Select or rename columns in a qseaSet sample table

selectQset()

Select or rename columns of a qseaSet sample table

setMart() getMart()

Set or get an Ensembl/BioMart handle on a qseaSet

setMesaAnnoDb()

Set default OrgDb (annoDb) for downstream annotation helpers

setMesaGenome()

Set default genome for downstream annotation helpers

setMesaParallel() getMesaParallel()

Manage mesa parallelisation (set & query)

setMesaTxDb()

Set default TxDb for downstream annotation helpers

sliceDMRs()

Take the top most DMRs per contrast, based on those with the largest value of the selected metric

sort(<qseaSet>)

Sort samples in a qseaSet

subsetQset()

Subset a qseaSet by samples

subsetWindowsBySignal()

Subset windows in a qseaSet by signal across samples

subsetWindowsOverBackground()

Subset windows above Poisson background

summariseAcrossWindows()

Summarise across windows per sample

summariseDMRsByContrast()

Summarise DMRs by contrast

summariseDMRsByGene()

Summarise DMRs by gene

writeBigWigs()

Write bigWig tracks per sample or group

writeDMRsToBed()

Write DMR results to BED files

writeDMRsToExcel()

Write DMR results to an Excel workbook

Contents
